name: CM_LIST_ITEM_FULL
description: Versatile list item component supporting multiple configurations: left icons (checkbox/radio/handle), main label with optional description, right elements (sub-label/switch/reorder indicator). Height 68px. Supports enabled/disabled states, selection highlighting. Base component for various list types.
visualForm: Horizontal layout (320x68px): [optional left icon 32px] | [label + description area] | [optional right element/label] with selection background
descriptionKo: 좌측 아이콘(체크박스/라디오/핸들), 메인 레이블+설명, 우측 요소(서브레이블/스위치/순서변경)를 조합 가능한 다목적 리스트 항목 컴포넌트입니다. 높이 68px, 활성/비활성 상태와 선택 하이라이트를 지원합니다.
descriptionEn: Versatile list item component supporting multiple configurations: left icons (checkbox/radio/handle), main label with optional description, right elements (sub-label/switch/reorder indicator). Height 68px. Supports enabled/disabled states, selection highlighting. Base component for various list types.
